Featuring tiled or wooden flooring, rooms at Kapuas Palace are air conditioned and fitted with a TV, minibar and en suite bathroom with shower. Tea and coffee-making facilities are available.

Guests including young children can enjoy a swim as a children's pool is also provided. Other facilities include a spa and a disco. Local and international dishes are available at Equator Coffee Shop. Room service is available.

It is a 30-minute drive to Supadio Airport and a 45-minute drive to Equator Monument.

Couples particularly like the location — they rated it 8.7 for a two-person trip.

Las habitaciones del Kapuas Palace disponen de suelo de baldosas o madera, aire acondicionado, TV, minibar y baño privado con ducha, además de set de té y café.

Este hotel alberga una piscina para niños, un spa, una discoteca y un local de restauración, el Equator Coffee Shop, donde se proponen platos de las cocinas local e internacional. También hay un servicio de habitaciones.

Este hotel se encuentra a 30 minutos en coche del aeropuerto de Supadio y a 45 minutos en coche del monumento al Ecuador.
